crafts.title: A love of thread since 1987
crafts.text: Founded in Lausanne, Au Point-Compté is a boutique specialising in needlework. For nearly 40 years, we have supported embroidery enthusiasts with a rigorous selection of premium materials.
points: Kits designed by our expert embroiderers
Personalised advice by phone and email
nFADP-compliant — your data stays in Switzerland

testimonials.title: They trust us

about.title: Who am I?
about.subtitle: A passion passed on — a shop that continues to live.
about.pullQuote: Passionate about embroidery for many years…
about.who1: My name is Julie and I am delighted to have taken over the Au Point-Compté shop on 1 January 2026.
about.who2: The shop was founded by Dorothée Bornick in 1995. It is a beautiful story that I am proud to carry on today.
about.who3: Passionate about embroidery for many years, I have always been fascinated by the delicacy of counted stitch, the richness of threads and the beauty of handmade creations. Taking over this shop was an obvious choice for me: a place dedicated to creativity, sharing and craftsmanship.
about.mission1: Through Au Point-Compté, I wish to keep this passion alive and share it by offering a carefully curated selection of fabrics, threads, patterns and accessories — for beginners and experienced embroiderers alike.
about.mission2: My goal is simple: to make the shop a warm space where everyone can find inspiration, advice and the joy of creating. I look forward to welcoming you.
about.timeline2026: Taken over by Julie — a new chapter begins
